title: Happy Birthday, Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: On his birthday, Geronimo is framed with fake money and must team up with Hercule to catch the counterfeiting Bamboozle family 🎂

q.en: What special day is it for Geronimo at the start of the story?
q.zh: 故事开头对 Geronimo 来说是什么特别的日子？

explain.en: Geronimo wakes up singing that today is the day he was born — it is his birthday.
explain.zh: Geronimo 醒来时唱着歌，说今天是他的出生日——也就是他的生日。

q.en: What is the name of the gross green drink the Bamboozles give Geronimo?
q.zh: Bamboozle 一家给 Geronimo 喝的那瓶难闻的绿色饮料叫什么？

options.en: Pineapple juice according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 菠萝汁（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Balencio offers Geronimo a free taste of their 'BBB' — Bamboozle Bubbly Beverage, a thick green liquid.
explain.zh: Balencio 让 Geronimo 免费尝了他们的“BBB”——Bamboozle Bubbly Beverage，一种浓稠的绿色液体。

q.en: Where does Geronimo's family take him for his birthday dinner?
q.zh: Geronimo 的家人带他去哪家餐厅吃生日晚餐？

options.en: The Movie Palace according to some versions of the story
options.zh: The Movie Palace（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo made plans to be with his family at the swankiest restaurant in the city, the Golden Cheese.
explain.zh: Geronimo 计划和家人在全城最豪华的餐厅 The Golden Cheese 聚会。

q.en: What fake identity does Geronimo's switched wallet show?
q.zh: 被调包的 wallet 里显示的假身份是谁？

options.en: Hercule Poirat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Hercule Poirat（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When Geronimo opens his wallet, his ID reads 'Dr. Falsefur' with a picture of cheese instead of his photo.
explain.zh: Geronimo 打开钱包时，身份证上写的是“Dr. Falsefur”，照片是一块奶酪而不是他本人。

q.en: Who pays Geronimo's restaurant bill and helps solve the mystery?
q.zh: 谁替 Geronimo 付了餐厅账单，并帮忙破案？

explain.en: Hercule arrives, vouches for Geronimo as an honest mouse, and pays the bill with his own credit card.
explain.zh: Hercule 赶到，为 Geronimo 担保他是诚实的老鼠，并用自己的信用卡付了账。

q.en: What banana-themed vehicle does Hercule drive?
q.zh: Hercule 开的、以香蕉为主题的车叫什么？

explain.en: Hercule cries 'To the Bananamobile!' — a yellow car filled with bananas and banana-themed gadgets.
explain.zh: Hercule 大喊“上 Bananamobile！”，那是一辆装满香蕉、布满香蕉元素的黄色汽车。

q.en: How many Bamboozle family members are behind the fake money?
q.zh: 制造假钞的 Bamboozle 家族成员共有几人？

options.en: Two: the watch shop owners according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 两人：手表店老板（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Four: Bettina and her three nephews
options.zh: 四人：Bettina 和她的三个侄子

explain.en: Geronimo concludes Dr. Falsefur is a team of four rodents — his new neighbors the Bamboozles (aunt plus three nephews).
explain.zh: Geronimo 推断 Dr. Falsefur 是一个四人团伙——他的新邻居 Bamboozle 一家（阿姨加三个侄子）。

q.en: At the supermarket, what ingredients did the thieves buy that connect them to the BBB drink?
q.zh: 在超市里，小偷买了哪些把她们和 BBB 饮料联系起来的配料？

options.en: Garlic, onions, broccoli, cabbage, and molasses
options.zh: 大蒜、洋葱、西兰花、卷心菜和糖蜜

options.en: Chocolate and strawberries according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 巧克力和草莓（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The supermarket cashier says the four rodents spent fake money on garlic, onions, broccoli, cabbage, and molasses — all BBB ingredients.
explain.zh: 超市收银员说那四只老鼠用假钱买了大蒜、洋葱、西兰花、卷心菜和糖蜜——全都是 BBB 饮料的配料。

q.en: Who is the real 'Dr. Falsefur,' the brains behind the operation?
q.zh: 真正的“Dr. Falsefur”、幕后主使是谁？

explain.en: Bettina boasts she is the genius who designs the bills and plans distribution, declaring 'I, Bettina Bamboozle, am the one true genius, Dr. Falsefur!'
explain.zh: Bettina 夸口说自己是设计假钞、策划分发的大脑，并宣称“我，Bettina Bamboozle，才是真正的天才 Dr. Falsefur！”

q.en: Who was secretly working with the Bamboozles to collect the fake bills?
q.zh: 谁暗中勾结 Bamboozle 一家，想要取走那些假钞？

explain.en: Madame No arrives in a leopard-print limo to pick up three suitcases of fake bills, but flees when the Bamboozles are caught.
explain.zh: Madame No 坐着豹纹豪华轿车来取三箱假钞，但在 Bamboozle 一家被抓后仓皇逃走。
